Package space.sunqian.fs.data

package space.sunqian.fs.data
This package and its subpackage provide utilities and interfaces to deal with data, such as JSON and Properties:
  • ByteData: Core byte data interface;
  • ByteDataParser: Core byte data parser interface;
  • ByteDataFormatter: Core byte data formatter interface;
  • CharData: Core char data interface;
  • CharDataParser: Core char data parser interface;
  • CharDataFormatter: Core char data formatter interface;
  • DataKit: Utilities for all data;
  • space.sunqian.fs.data.json: Subpackage for JSON;
  • space.sunqian.fs.data.properties: Subpackage for Properties;
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    space.sunqian.fs
    The root package of fs, provides root supports for fs:
    space.sunqian.fs.data.json
    Provides utilities and interfaces for JSON: JsonData: Core data interface for JSON; JsonParser: Core parser for JSON; JsonFormatter: Core formatter for JSON; JsonKit: Utilities for JSON;
    space.sunqian.fs.data.properties
    Provides utilities and interfaces for Properties: PropertiesData: Core data interface for Properties; PropertiesParser: Core parser for Properties; PropertiesKit: Utilities for Properties;
  • Class
    Description
    ByteData
    Represents byte data, which can be written to OutputStream or WritableByteChannel.
    ByteDataFormatter<T>
    Represents byte data formatter that formats a given data to formatting bytes.
    ByteDataParser<T>
    Represents byte data parser that parses data from a data source (e.g.
    CharData
    Represents char data, which can be written to Appendable.
    CharDataFormatter<T>
    Represents char data formatter that formats a given data to formatting string.
    CharDataParser<T>
    Represents char data parser that parses data from a data source (e.g.
    DataException
    Base exception for data errors.
    DataFormattingException
    Base exception for data formatting errors.
    DataKit
    Utilities for data, such as JSON and Properties.
    DataList
    This interface extends the List interface with signature List<Object>, provides methods to get and convert values to common types, such as DataList.getString(int), DataList.getInt(int), etc.
    DataMap
    This interface extends the Map interface with signature Map<String, Object>, provides methods to get and convert values to common types, such as DataMap.getString(String), DataMap.getInt(String), etc.
    DataParsingException
    Base exception for data parsing errors.
